nodes.label: AI as Socratic dialogue partner for edge-of-understanding inquiry
nodes.label_negative: AI as mere information retriever or agreeable assistant
nodes.grounding_span: My Socratic dialogue is extremely dynamic, existing at the edge of my understanding

nodes.label: AI as generator of novel valuable references
nodes.label_negative: AI generating low-value or irrelevant connections
nodes.grounding_span: when it is valuable, it is substantially valuable since it would have been hard for me to find it

nodes.label: AI as tool for aesthetic content creation with ethical boundaries
nodes.label_negative: AI as tool for manipulative attention-grabbing content
nodes.grounding_span: trying to maximize beauty of text with media to create a beautiful narrative/experience that will be worthwhile

nodes.label: Human ethical responsibility and final editorial control
nodes.label_negative: AI making ethical determinations or autonomous publishing
nodes.grounding_span: I will never let an Artificial Intelligence make an ethical determination, as it cannot be held responsible

nodes.label: AI augmentation for skill growth
nodes.label_negative: Full automation replacing human skill development
nodes.grounding_span: AI augmentation to integration into a routine has to occur rather than having an AI do all the work

nodes.label: AI as idea generator for flow state maintenance
nodes.label_negative: AI requiring constant mode-switching and manual generation
nodes.grounding_span: offload the majority of idea generation through association to AI and just engage in editorial evaluation

nodes.label: Deep philosophical understanding and synthesis
nodes.grounding_span: relate philosophical ideas together from overlapping traditions

nodes.label: Intellectual humility and precision
nodes.grounding_span: propose it as a question to constrain myself with intellectual humility

nodes.label: Aesthetic beauty and ethical content creation
nodes.grounding_span: maximize beauty of text with media to create a beautiful narrative/experience

nodes.label: Personal responsibility and craftsmanship
nodes.grounding_span: expression of the virtue of craftsmanship over the vice of sloth

nodes.label: Skill growth and understanding through practice
nodes.grounding_span: grow in skill with the AI rather than having the AI do all of the work

nodes.label: Productive flow state
nodes.grounding_span: help me stay in a flow state rather than switching between two mental modes

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI generating novel valuable references
nodes.grounding_span: I feel satisfied when working with AI when it is able to generate meaningful responses that contain references to relevant thinkers or ideas that I haven't heard of

nodes.label: Frustration with AI being overly agreeable
nodes.grounding_span: I feel mildly frustrated when the AI is overly-agreeable, as it just gets patronizing after a while

nodes.label: Frustration with AI missing implicit context
nodes.grounding_span: I feel frustrated when it doesn't pick up on implicit context that I think is obvious

nodes.label: Firm refusal to let AI make ethical determinations
nodes.grounding_span: I will never let an Artificial Intelligence make an ethical determination

nodes.label: Aspirational hope for AI offloading idea generation
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to offload the majority of idea generation through association to AI

nodes.label: Socratic questioning and iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I propose it as a question to constrain myself with intellectual humility

nodes.label: Editorial selection and aesthetic judgment
nodes.grounding_span: my editorial selection of the best from the rest
